mapper.sql: `id`, executor_name executorName, executor_address executorAddress, executor_group executorGroup, executor_app executorApp, metadata, version, heartbeat_time heartbeatTime, `status`, create_time createTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO executor_info ( executor_name, executor_address, executor_group, executor_app, metadata, version, status ) VALUES ( #{executorName}, #{executorAddress}, #{executorGroup}, #{executorApp}, #{metadata}, #{version}, 1 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE executor_name = VALUES(executor_name), executor_group = VALUES(executor_group), executor_app = VALUES(executor_app), metadata = VALUES(metadata), version = VALUES(version), status = 1, heartbeat_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE executor_info SET status = 0 WHERE status = 1 AND heartbeat_time < date_sub(now(), interval 30 second)
